CONTENT.Club career: He made his Serie C debut for Lecce on 30 September 2017 in a game against Bisceglie.On 10 August 2018, following the loan in the 2017–18 season, he joined Lecce on a permanent basis, signing a three-year contract.On 25 November 2019 he made his Serie A debut against Cagliari.On 17 January 2020 he joined Serie C club Gubbio on loan.On 1 February 2021 he was loaned to Serie C club Livorno.On 6 July 2021, he signed a two-year contract with an additional option year with Piacenza.On 19 August 2022, Dubickas signed a four-year contract with Pordenone.On 31 January 2023, Dubickas signed with Pisa and was loaned back to Pordenone for the rest of the 2022–23 season.On 24 August 2023, Dubickas moved on loan to Catania.
CONTENT.External links: Edgaras Dubickas at SoccerwayEdgaras Dubickas at TuttoCalciatori.net (in Italian)Edgaras Dubickas at National-Football-Teams.com
CONTENT.International career: Dubickas debuted with the senior Lithuania national team in a friendly 4–0 loss to Spain on 8 June 2021.

SUMMARY: Edgaras Dubickas (born 9 July 1998) is a Lithuanian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Italian club Pisa, and the Lithuania national team.
